Fields.Name: Disable Param - Network Test
Fields.Description: Parameters marked with  are excluded in the NT version package.

Fields.Name: Event Flag ID
Fields.Description: Release condition event flag ID

Fields.Name: Bonfire Entity ID
Fields.Description: Bonfire entity ID

Fields.Name: Sort ID
Fields.Description: Bonfire Warp Subcategory Sort ID. Specify the order (ascending order) in the same subcategory

Fields.Name: Warp Prohibition Icon ID
Fields.Description: Icon ID when warp is prohibited

Fields.Name: Display Zoom Step
Fields.Description: Zoom step to display the bonfire (0 when zoomed out most, +1 for each zoom). Displayed when Display zoom step  Current zoom step. Default is 0 (always displayed)

Fields.Name: Selectable Zoom Step
Fields.Description: A zoom step that allows you to select and snap a bonfire (0 for the most zoomed out state, +1 for each zoom). Can be selected and snapped when Selectable zoom step  current enlargement stage. The default is 0 (always selectable / snappable)

Fields.Name: Subcategory ID
Fields.Description: Bonfire Warp Subcategory Parameter ID (-1: Invalid). Set which subcategory it belongs to. If it is invalid, it will not be displayed in the bonfire list.

Fields.Name: Cleared Event Flag ID
Fields.Description: Cleared event flag ID (0: always treated as cleared)

Fields.Name: Icon ID
Fields.Description: Icon ID

Fields.Name: Display Setting M00
Fields.Description: Whether to display with M00

Fields.Name: Display Setting M01
Fields.Description: Whether to display with M01

Fields.Name: Display Setting M02
Fields.Description: Whether to display with M02

Fields.Name: Map Area
Fields.Description: AA part of mAA_BB_CC_DD

Fields.Name: Map Block
Fields.Description: BB part of mAA_BB_CC_DD

Fields.Name: Map Region
Fields.Description: CC part of mAA_BB_CC_DD

Fields.Name: Coordinate: X
Fields.Description: X coordinate

Fields.Name: Coordinate: Y
Fields.Description: Y coordinate (not used)

Fields.Name: Coordinate: Z
Fields.Description: Z coordinate

Fields.Name: Text ID [1]
Fields.Description: The text ID to display. If the value is invalid (-1), nothing is displayed.

Fields.Name: Text Enable Flag ID [1]
Fields.Description: Display text Event flag ID. Display if the event flag is On. If the event flag ID (0) is invalid, it will be treated as On.

Fields.Name: Text Disable Flag ID [1]
Fields.Description: Hidden event flag ID of the text. If the event flag is On, it will not be displayed. It takes precedence over the display event flag ID. If the event flag ID (0) is invalid, it will be treated as Off.

Fields.Name: Text ID [2]
Fields.Description: The text ID to display. If it is an invalid value (-2), nothing is displayed.

Fields.Name: Text Enable Flag ID [2]
Fields.Description: Display text Event flag ID. Display if the event flag is On. If the event flag ID (1) is invalid, it will be treated as On.

Fields.Name: Text Disable Flag ID [2]
Fields.Description: Hidden event flag ID of the text. If the event flag is On, it will not be displayed. It takes precedence over the display event flag ID. If the event flag ID (1) is invalid, it will be treated as Off.

Fields.Name: Text ID [3]
Fields.Description: The text ID to display. If it is an invalid value (-3), nothing is displayed.

Fields.Name: Text Enable Flag ID [3]
Fields.Description: Display text Event flag ID. Display if the event flag is On. If the event flag ID (2) is invalid, it will be treated as On.

Fields.Name: Text Disable Flag ID [3]
Fields.Description: Hidden event flag ID of the text. If the event flag is On, it will not be displayed. It takes precedence over the display event flag ID. If the event flag ID (2) is invalid, it will be treated as Off.

Fields.Name: Text ID [4]
Fields.Description: The text ID to display. If it is an invalid value (-4), nothing is displayed.

Fields.Name: Text Enable Flag ID [4]
Fields.Description: Display text Event flag ID. Display if the event flag is On. If the event flag ID (3) is invalid, it will be treated as On.

Fields.Name: Text Disable Flag ID [4]
Fields.Description: Hidden event flag ID of the text. If the event flag is On, it will not be displayed. It takes precedence over the display event flag ID. If the event flag ID (3) is invalid, it will be treated as Off.

Fields.Name: Text ID [5]
Fields.Description: The text ID to display. If it is an invalid value (-5), nothing is displayed.

Fields.Name: Text Enable Flag ID [5]
Fields.Description: Display text Event flag ID. Display if the event flag is On. If the event flag ID (4) is invalid, it will be treated as On.

Fields.Name: Text Disable Flag ID [5]
Fields.Description: Hidden event flag ID of the text. If the event flag is On, it will not be displayed. It takes precedence over the display event flag ID. If the event flag ID (4) is invalid, it will be treated as Off.

Fields.Name: Text ID [6]
Fields.Description: The text ID to display. If it is an invalid value (-6), nothing is displayed.

Fields.Name: Text Enable Flag ID [6]
Fields.Description: Display text Event flag ID. Display if the event flag is On. If the event flag ID (5) is invalid, it will be treated as On.

Fields.Name: Text Disable Flag ID [6]
Fields.Description: Hidden event flag ID of the text. If the event flag is On, it will not be displayed. It takes precedence over the display event flag ID. If the event flag ID (5) is invalid, it will be treated as Off.

Fields.Name: Text ID [7]

Fields.Name: Text Enable Flag ID [7]
Fields.Description: Display text Event flag ID. Display if the event flag is On. If the event flag ID (6) is invalid, it will be treated as On.

Fields.Name: Text Disable Flag ID [7]
Fields.Description: Hidden event flag ID of the text. If the event flag is On, it will not be displayed. It takes precedence over the display event flag ID. If the event flag ID (6) is invalid, it will be treated as Off.

Fields.Name: Text ID [8]
Fields.Description: The text ID to display. If it is an invalid value (-8), nothing is displayed.

Fields.Name: Text Enable Flag ID [8]
Fields.Description: Display text Event flag ID. Display if the event flag is On. If the event flag ID (7) is invalid, it will be treated as On.

Fields.Name: Bonfire Ignition - Dummy Poly ID [0]
Fields.Description: Damipoli ID that issues SFX before bonfire ignition

Fields.Name: Bonfire Ignition - SFX ID [0]
Fields.Description: SFX ID issued before bonfire ignition. It goes out when ignited. In case of -1, SFX is not issued.

Fields.Name: Bonfire Ignition - Dummy Poly ID [1]
Fields.Description: Damipoli ID that issues SFX before bonfire ignition

Fields.Name: Bonfire Ignition - SFX ID [1]
Fields.Description: SFX ID issued before bonfire ignition. It goes out when ignited. In case of -1, SFX is not issued.

Fields.Name: Alternate Icon ID
Fields.Description: Icon ID that applies when a Text Enable Flag ID is true and it's corrosponding Text Type is set to 1

Fields.Name: Alternate Warp Prohibition Icon ID
Fields.Description: Icon ID when warp is prohibited, when certain conditions are met
